pi_items.source: Task description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py require this specific file path.
Task description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py require this specific file path.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require these exact columns in the CSV.
Task description explicitly specifies span levels starting from 2.
Task description explicitly specifies span levels up to 9.
Task description explicitly specifies 2 trials each for span levels 2 through 9.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the creation of a Python experiment script at `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/corsi_task.py` and a CSV conditions file at `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/corsi_sequences.csv`. The CSV must contain the columns `span_level`, `trial_num`, and `sequence`. It requires span levels from 2 to 9, with exactly 2 trials per span level. All of these constraints are verified against the task description and verifier implementation.
